search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:cameras" $orgid$ | rename eventData.start as "Event Start Time", eventData.end as "Event End Time", deviceName as "Name", deviceSerial as "Serial", category as "Category" , description as "Description", type as "Type", networkId as "Network ID" | table "Name", "Serial","Category", "Network ID", "Description", "Type", "Event Start Time", "Event End Time"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:cameras" $orgid$ deviceName="$row.Name$" deviceSerial="$row.Serial$" category="$row.Category$" description="$row.Description$" type="$row.Type$" networkId="$row.Network ID$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:cameras" $orgid$ | stats count as Count by networkId | rename networkId as "Netrwork Id"
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:cameras" $orgid$ | stats count as Count by type | rename type as "Type"
